_readme: Snapshot of the Observation Lab environment at the time Phase 2 ran. Required for reproducibility — if someone re-runs the observations on a different machine or version, they can compare against this baseline.
captured_at: (ISO timestamp — filled by handler.ts at Phase 2 completion)

tool_versions.openclaw: (fill in — run: openclaw --version or check package.json)
tool_versions.ffmpeg: (fill in if used — run: ffmpeg -version | head -1, or 'not used')
tool_versions.python: (fill in if used — run: python --version, or 'not used')

network.proxy: (fill in — e.g. 'none' or proxy URL if applicable)

target_endpoints.url: (paste the base URL probed during Phase 2 — e.g. https://api.spotify.com)

workspace.skill_root: (fill in — absolute path to skill-bacon-creator/ on this machine)

reproduction_notes: (Any conditions that would affect reproducibility — e.g. 'API token scoped to igor@example.com account', 'rate limit observed at >2 req/sec', 'curl version differs from docs example')
